[[Professor/Legends|Professor]] '''Brelln Dricella''' was the [[Chief Astrographer]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Astrographic Survey Institute]]. Professor Dricella compiled the Institute's report on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[N'zoth]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' {{1stm}}
